name: @soltrade/hot-state
description: Pure hot-state interface + in-memory reference store (ADR-0001 Phase 6A): locks / TTL get-set / rate-limits / cursors / provider-health + readiness cache. Hot-state is CACHE ONLY — never source of truth (Postgres/JSON is SoT); every entry is rebuildable. No redis driver, no timers, no network — the clock is injected and the Redis-backed store lives in apps/server. See docs/architecture/package-boundaries.md.
